title: Professionalism a priority after Ashes - Duckett
description: England opener Ben Duckett says greater professionalism is a major "priority" for him following a winter Ashes series blighted by off-the-field issues including claims of excessive drinking.

title: Cricket legend Ashwin set to join U.S. league MLC
description: One of India's all-time best cricket players, Ravichandran Ashwin, will join the San Francisco Unicorns for the upcoming edition of Major League Cricket. Ashwin is the first former Indian national team player to play in the U.S. league.
